visa_types.name: Social Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
REQUIREMENT– GENERAL - SOCIAL
Please find the below requirement in order to apply for a Singapore visa:
Please click on below link for more information on visa requirements:
https://www.ica.gov.sg/enteranddeparting/before/entryvisa/ (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enteranddeparting/before/entryvisa/)
Click here for checklist for Chennai.
Click here for checklist for Chandigarh.
Points to be noted for Chandigarh Applicants:- 
Form 14a to fill manually / digitally 
- Form should be filled & signed by the applicant with Blue pen (In case of minor's both the parents should sign). 
- Number of entries in Singapore should be filled as Multiple only 
- Photo should be pasted on form and should be cross signed by the applicants (In case of minor's both the parents should sign). 
- Customer are advised to apply for an entry visa within 30 days prior to arrival in Singapore.
visa_types.visa_fees:
- Application Fee
The visa application for each application is INR 2100

[sgp > ind > en > Visa Fees]
Please note:
- The visa and service fee is non-refundable.
- Effective 01 April 2026 VFS Service charge will be INR 1180 (including GST) per application.
- Effective 01 April 2026 Singapore Visa Fee will be INR 2100 per application.
Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of INR 1180 including GST per application. This fee is payable by cash/card.
Additional services
The fees listed are in addition to the visa application fee and the service charges. The services can be purchased at the visa application. These services are supplied by VFS.
Processing Time
The processing time is between three to five working days, excluding the day of submission. Some applications may take longer to process, especially during peak times.
visa_types.processing_time: The processing time is between three to five working days, excluding the day of submission. Some applications may take longer to process, especially during peak times.
visa_types.forms:
Please click on below link for more information on visa requirements:
https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/visa_requirements/visa-detail-page/india (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/visa_requirements/visa-detail-page/india)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Please select the consular district you live in to learn at which Visa Application Centre you can apply for a visa.

*Singapore High Commission, New Delhi.
The High Commission of the Republic of Singapore in New Delhi processes visa applications from the following seventeen states and two union territories in VFS Chandigarh Singapore visa application Centre:
 
1) Jammu & Kashmir
2) Himachal Pradesh
3) Punjab
4) Chandigarh
5) Haryana
6) Delhi
7) Uttarakhand
8) Uttar Pradesh
9) Bihar
10) Jharkhand
11) West Bengal
12) Assam
13) Sikkim
14) Manipur
15) Meghalaya
16) Tripura
17) Arunachal Pradesh
18) Nagaland
19) Mizoram
 
Applicant holding passports issued outside these jurisdictions must provide proof of residence from one of the above states or union territories when applying through the High Commission's Office. 

*Consulate General of Singapore, Chennai*

Jurisdiction : Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala and Puducherry, Karnataka, Lakshadweep, Telangana

Select the visa type that is right for you to see important information on visa fees, documents required, forms, photo specifications and processing times.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please select the consular district you live in to learn at which Visa Application Centre you can apply for a visa.

*Singapore High Commission, New Delhi.
The High Commission of the Republic of Singapore in New Delhi processes visa applications from the following seventeen states and two union territories in VFS Chandigarh Singapore visa application Centre:
 
1) Jammu & Kashmir
2) Himachal Pradesh
3) Punjab
4) Chandigarh
5) Haryana
6) Delhi
7) Uttarakhand
8) Uttar Pradesh
9) Bihar
10) Jharkhand
11) West Bengal
12) Assam
13) Sikkim
14) Manipur
15) Meghalaya
16) Tripura
17) Arunachal Pradesh
18) Nagaland
19) Mizoram
 
Applicant holding passports issued outside these jurisdictions must provide proof of residence from one of the above states or union territories when applying through the High Commission's Office. 

*Consulate General of Singapore, Chennai*

Jurisdiction : Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala and Puducherry, Karnataka, Lakshadweep, Telangana

Select the visa type that is right for you to see important information on visa fees, documents required, forms, photo specifications and processing times.

## Visa Fees
- Application Fee
The visa application for each application is INR 2100

[sgp > ind > en > Visa Fees]
Please note:
- The visa and service fee is non-refundable.
- Effective 01 April 2026 VFS Service charge will be INR 1180 (including GST) per application.
- Effective 01 April 2026 Singapore Visa Fee will be INR 2100 per application.
Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of INR 1180 including GST per application. This fee is payable by cash/card.
Additional services
The fees listed are in addition to the visa application fee and the service charges. The services can be purchased at the visa application. These services are supplied by VFS.
Processing Time
The processing time is between three to five working days, excluding the day of submission. Some applications may take longer to process, especially during peak times.

## Documents Required
REQUIREMENT– GENERAL - SOCIAL
Please find the below requirement in order to apply for a Singapore visa:
Please click on below link for more information on visa requirements:
https://www.ica.gov.sg/enteranddeparting/before/entryvisa/ (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enteranddeparting/before/entryvisa/)
Click here for checklist for Chennai.
Click here for checklist for Chandigarh.
Points to be noted for Chandigarh Applicants:- 
Form 14a to fill manually / digitally 
- Form should be filled & signed by the applicant with Blue pen (In case of minor's both the parents should sign). 
- Number of entries in Singapore should be filled as Multiple only 
- Photo should be pasted on form and should be cross signed by the applicants (In case of minor's both the parents should sign). 
- Customer are advised to apply for an entry visa within 30 days prior to arrival in Singapore.

## Photo Specifications
Please refer to www.ica.gov.sg/photo-guidelines (https://www.ica.gov.sg/photo-guidelines) for further information.

## Processing Time
The processing time is between three to five working days, excluding the day of submission. Some applications may take longer to process, especially during peak times.

## Download Forms
Please click on below link for more information on visa requirements:
https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/visa_requirements/visa-detail-page/india (https://www.ica.gov.sg/enter-transit-depart/entering-singapore/visa_requirements/visa-detail-page/india)

Please note:
- The visa and service fee is non-refundable.
- Effective 01 April 2026 VFS Service charge will be 1180 per application (including GST).
- Effective 01 April 2026 Singapore Visa Fee will be INR 2100 per application.
Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of INR 1180 including GST per application. This fee is payable by cash/card.
Additional services
The fees listed here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/singapore/malaysia/english/pdf/Revison-of-Singapore-Visa-Fee.pdf) are in addition to the visa application fee and the service charges. The services can be purchased at the visa application. These services are supplied by VFS.

The processing time is between three to five working days, excluding the day of submission. Some applications may take longer to process, especially during peak times.
